verification.note: Reported by the SinFormer authors (arXiv:2605.24389, 2026), NOT reproduced by this repo. 0.895 = closed-set rank1 device-ID accuracy on WiSig ManyTx (150 transmitters), verified in the arXiv HTML (Section 5 / Fig.14). from_paper_UNCERTAIN: WiSig ships EQUALIZED and NON-EQUALIZED preambles and the paper does not state which it uses (our closed_set column is NON-equalized -- equalization removes the channel that WiSig fingerprinting tests), and the exact tx/rx/day pool + split differ from our sei-wisig-closedset-strat-tx-8010-seed42-v1 -> only the dataset family + track name match, the protocol/condition is not confirmed identical. Literature reference, never conflated with our in-repo WiSig baselines (resnet1d_sei 0.8938 verified).
